title: Accessible Slider

statement.markdown:
# Accessible Slider

As a user with visual impairments, I want to be able to navigate and interact with a slider on your website in a way that is accessible to me. This includes using a screen reader to read out the slider's value and being able to increment or decrement the slider's value using the keyboard.
requirements
1. The slider's value should be announced by a screen reader when it changes.
2. The user should be able to increment or decrement the slider's value using the arrow keys on their keyboard.
3. The slider's value should be displayed in a way that is readable by screen readers.

constraints: Must be keyboard accessible with arrow keys
Must announce value changes to screen readers

gradingCriteria.description: The slider's value is announced by a screen reader when it changes.
The user can increment or decrement the slider's value using the arrow keys on their keyboard.
The slider's value is displayed in a way that is readable by screen readers.
